GRules.GeneralRules1: Chocolate Deluxe is a 6 by 6 symbols combination video slot featuring sticky winning symbols with multipliers up to x100.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 10 base bet (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced with game specific configurations.
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 10 base bet (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.01 to 10.

GRules.GeneralRules3: A combination win in cash is equal to the value shown in the "Paytable" multiplied by the bet size and bet multiplier
GRules.GeneralRules4: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.

GCommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination1: At every spin, any combinations of 5 or more symbols touching horizontally or vertically will result in a winning combination.
GCommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination2: If there is one or more winning combination on the reels, all symbols that is not involved in a win will explode, allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
GCommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination3: At every round, additional or increased winning combinations will trigger more rounds until there are no more additional and increased winning combinations.
GCommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination4: When there are no more additional or increased winning combinations, payout is made for each symbol according to the Paytable.
GCommonRules.WildsExplaination1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter Symbol.

GSymbolMultiplier.Title: Symbol Multiplier
GSymbolMultiplier.SymbolMultExplaination1: During any spin, symbols (excluding Wild symbol and Scatter symbol) with multiplier between x2 to x100 may appear on the reels.
GSymbolMultiplier.SymbolMultExplaination2: At the end of every spin, the total win will be multiplied by the combined multiplier of the winning symbols.
GSymbolMultiplier.SymbolMultExplaination3: All Wild and Scatter symbols will remain on the reels until the end of a spin.

GFreeSpinRules.Title: Free Spins Feature
GFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
GFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination2: Any multipliers collected during any free spin will be accumulated and will remain at the bottom of the reels until the end of the Free Spins Feature.
GFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination3: At the end of every free spin, if there is 1 or more winning symbol with multiplier on the reel, the total win for that spin will be multiplied by both the multiplier at the bottom of the reels and the combined multipliers of the winning symbols.

GMaximumWin.Title: Maximum Win
GMaximumWin.MaximumWinExplaination1: The maximum win amount is %{5000}x of the bet amount.
GMaximumWin.MaximumWinExplaination2: If the total win in the main game or the Free Spins Feature reaches %{5000}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.
